Tomato_Early_blight: Remove infected leaves, apply recommended fungicide, and improve air circulation.
Tomato_Late_blight: Avoid overhead watering, remove infected parts, and use copper-based fungicide.
Tomato_healthy: No disease detected. Maintain regular watering and nutrient care.
Potato_Early_blight: Use crop rotation, remove affected leaves, and apply protective fungicide.
Potato_Late_blight: Remove infected plants immediately and use suitable fungicide.
Potato_healthy: No disease detected. Continue proper plant care.
Pepper_Bacterial_spot: Use disease-free seeds, avoid leaf wetness, and apply copper-based sprays.
Pepper_healthy: No disease detected. Maintain good field hygiene and regular care.
